# Release Notes v0.1.0

codexBot v0.1.0 is the first public Web release focused on IM bridge management and Codex runtime monitoring.

## Highlights

- Pure Web edition, no desktop shell included
- QQ / Telegram / 飞书 / Discord configuration pages
- Bridge status, start, stop, restart, logs, and doctor actions
- SSE real-time log streaming
- Session bindings, audit viewer, and conversation detail modal
- Message search / role filtering / audit export
- One-click repair, stale PID repair, alert thresholds, and browser notifications

## Included

- `scripts/` bridge and console commands
- `ui-console/` Web control panel
- `vendor/Claude-to-IM-skill/` bridge core vendor copy
- `INSTALL.md` setup guide

## Notes

- Runtime config and logs remain under `C:\Users\Administrator\.claude-to-im`
- Web console requires local `node`
- Some write operations depend on local filesystem permissions
